notes: Full generated UI images are not used as UI backgrounds.
Text, buttons, cards, and navigation are rebuilt in HTML/CSS.
Material Symbols are used for functional UI icons because this static app already imports them.
Home actions do not link to legacy /simple pages until each destination is rebuilt from the canonical UI references.
The header wordmark and six home action illustrations were extracted as standalone transparent UI assets instead of using Material Symbols as the main visual.
2026-06-30: Patient switching was moved out of the header into a full-width selector card, and visible crop failures were replaced with cleaner standalone assets.
2026-06-30: The six primary action tiles were changed from a two-column grid to larger one-column buttons for readability.
2026-07-12: Added four age-inclusive selectable watercolor avatars: adult man, adult woman, boy, and girl.
2026-07-12: Removed child-only wording from patient switching because adult family members may also have Alagille syndrome.
2026-07-12: Added a realistic fictional lab report for OCR training. Tutorial records are kept outside the actual record store and disappear when the tutorial ends.
2026-07-12: Replaced the simplified report with pediatric v3, removed the reception number, added a reference range to every row, and aligned H/L colors and OCR values with the source image.
